title: RLR ladies receive Women's Month surprise
description: GEORGE NEWS - The ladies of the RLR...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The ladies of the RLR Retirement Centre were recently spoilt with a sweet surprise from George Round Table 30 as part of Women's Month celebrations.


> The Round Tablers arrived with warm smiles and a beautifully personalised cup and freshly baked cupcake for each lady.


“Each gift was a heartfelt token of love and appreciation. The thoughtful gesture brought so much joy and made our residents feel truly celebrated," said Angelique Botha, the RLR Service Centre’s co-ordinator.

"It was a lovely reminder that kindness is one of the most precious gifts we can give.

"A huge thank you to Jocelyn Enslin, along with the George Round Table 30 ladies, for making this Women’s Day so memorable.”

Gwyneth Verster (centre) receives her gift and cupcake from Jocelyn Enslin (left) and Anmar Vermeulen, both of Round Table George 30.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
